mechanics.excerpt: To Serve ad Protect (4), Covert Ops (4) Police Academy Events Accident on the firing range (Poor Hearing; choose one: Amnesia_ Combat Paralysis Disability (21] Framed by dirty cop (Enemy; Bad Reputation_ must take Ne'er-Do Well Path next] Partner killed in front of you (Quirk /Flashbacks_ Addiction] Helped capture crime boss [Enemy (2), Good Reputation] Desk job [Pistols -1, Intimidation 2, Shotguns Computers +1_ Comms /Conv: +21 Instructor' pet [Contact] Aced your classes [may enter Police Detective Tactical Unit training as next path] Sharpshooter [Natural Aptitude /Pistols] Expert cadet (add +2 to all Police Officer Field skills] Decorated for bravery after saving lives on field assignment (WIL +1_ Brave Good Reputation , Pistols +1 Tactics / Infantry +1] [Choose one event roll twice and apply both results] Subpath: Officer Candidate School (OCS) Entry via event roll only Tlme: year Attrlbute Thresholds: CHA +1 Tralts: Commission (Rank Skllls: Strategy +2, Tactics Any Fields: Officer Training Next Path: Per last Dath followed; add to its Next Path options the Tour of Duty: Social General" Path the character has Lyran Alliance Affiliation SUN ZHANG MECHWARRIOR ACADEMY Draconis Combine Affiliation only: Cannot have Combat Paralysis, Disabled, Lost Limb, Poor Hearing or Poor Vision traits The largest academy of its kind in the Inner Sphere graduating more than four hundred soldiers annually the Sun Zhang MechWarrior Academy (SZMA) is feared and respected throughout the Draconis Combine ad the rest of the Successor States_ Located on the world of New Samarkand, tne SZMA trains BattleMech_ aerospace fighter and armored infantry cadets (the latter being recent addition).
